note: CANONICAL BACKUP — generated from source of truth. Do NOT edit this file directly.

mods.name: Unmanned
mods.desc: No crew. Requires Remote Operator or Machine Intelligence.

mods.name: Open Crew
mods.desc: Take 1: Medium Cover (-4). Take 2: Light Cover (-2). Take 3: No Cover.

mods.name: Temperamental
mods.desc: Repair at -1 per take. Snake eyes on vehicle roll: random system shorts for 1 round.

mods.name: Gas-Guzzler
mods.desc: +50% fuel consumption.

mods.name: Low-Tech
mods.desc: No electronics. Cannot install electronic mods.

mods.name: Skeleton Crew
mods.desc: Halve crew capacity.

mods.name: Bone Shaker
mods.desc: Unstable Platform penalty is -3 instead of -2.

mods.name: Death Trap
mods.desc: Full collision damage. Eject at -2. Crew take +2 damage from penetrating hits.

mods.name: Machine Intelligence
mods.desc: AI companion. 1st: d6+Wild Die. 2nd: d8. 3rd: d10 + one free action per round.

mods.name: Enhanced Sensors
mods.desc: 30x magnification, ignore 2 Illumination, +1 Notice.

mods.name: Tactical Relay
mods.desc: Share sensory feeds with linked vehicles. +1 Battle rolls.

mods.name: Signal Rig
mods.desc: 15 mile range (1st), 75 miles (2nd). +1 cooperative rolls in range.

mods.name: Remote Operator
mods.desc: Operate remotely at -1 Piloting/Driving. Requires Signal Rig.

mods.name: Detection Grid
mods.desc: Active detection 40 yds. +2 Notice vs hidden/concealed.

mods.name: Sensor Array
mods.desc: Scan 1 light-year / LOS. Full round, Vulnerable. +2 Notice extreme range.

mods.name: Sloped Armour
mods.desc: -2 enemy Shooting (direct-fire energy/kinetic only).

mods.name: Countermeasure Suite
mods.desc: +2 vs Guided Weapons. One free Evasion reroll per encounter.

mods.name: Surge Protection
mods.desc: Halve EMP penalties (round down).

mods.name: Crew Escape
mods.desc: Ejection (Size 6-) or pods (Size 7+). Agility/Smarts at -1.

mods.name: Nanorepair System
mods.desc: 1st: d6/round, 5-6 heals 1 Wound. 2nd: heals on 4-6.

mods.name: Deflection Field
mods.desc: Charges = Wounds/2. Soak with Smarts. Recharges 1/round out of combat.

mods.name: Stealth System
mods.desc: -4 to detect with Electronics. Low-observable profile.

mods.name: Gimballed Weapons
mods.desc: Reduce Unstable Platform penalty to -1 for all direct-fire weapons.

mods.name: Fire Control
mods.desc: Reduce Shooting penalties by 1 (Called Shot, Cover, Range, Scale, Speed). On raise, by 2.

mods.name: Amphibious Kit
mods.desc: Enter water. Handling -1, Speed 2. 2nd take: Speed 3.

mods.name: Boost Injector
mods.desc: Once/encounter: +1 Speed Rating for one round per take.

mods.name: Reserve Tanks
mods.desc: +50% fuel capacity per take.

mods.name: Off-Road Package
mods.desc: Wheeled only. Halve Difficult Ground penalties.

mods.name: Fusion Core
mods.desc: Energy x8. Locomotion Critical: 1-2 on d6 = core breach.

mods.name: Road Vehicle
mods.desc: Wheeled only. +3 Speed Ratings on paved roads.

mods.name: Submersible
mods.desc: Submerge as action. -4 to detect. 2nd: deep dive, crush-proof.

mods.name: Variable Form
mods.desc: Switch between two locomotion types as an action.

mods.name: Berths
mods.desc: Each take adds living space for 8.

mods.name: Comfort Upgrade
mods.desc: Take 1: +1 Spirit. Take 2: +2 Spirit, +1 Persuasion. Take 3: +3 Spirit, +2 Persuasion.

mods.name: Troop Bay
mods.desc: 8 passengers per take, short trips.

mods.name: Specialist Workshop
mods.desc: Skill-specific facility. +2 to relevant Trait rolls.

mods.name: Environmental Seal
mods.desc: Airtight, pressurised, life support. Vacuum, gas, radiation protection.

mods.name: Vehicle Bay
mods.desc: Carry up to 8 Size points per take. Includes fuelling and maintenance.

mods.name: Jump Jets
mods.desc: Move as VTOL once per encounter. Walker only.

mods.name: Dual Cockpit
mods.desc: Requires two pilots. Walker only.

mods.name: Compact Engineering
mods.desc: Miniaturised components. Each take grants +1 Mod slot.
